title: Section 22
content: 1[22. Extent of Act. --This Act, as amended by subsequent Acts, extends to the whole of India except 2[the territories which, immediately before the 1st November, 1956, were comprised in Part B States]; but it shall not apply to carriages ordinarily plying for hire within the limits of any municipality or cantonment or other place in which any law for the regulation of carriages is for the time being in force. ]
footnote: 1. Sections 22 and 23 added by Act 1 of 1898, s. 5. The section 22 regarding the commencement of this Act as originally passed had been rep. by Act 14 of 1870, s. 1 and the Schedule Part II. 2. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956, for Part B States.
